title: Iran Says It Will Oversee Strait of Hormuz Traffic, Even in Peacetime
summary_full: The United States says Iran’s claims to control the strait are illegal, but Tehran has made escalating assertions of authority over the vital waterway.
summary_public: The United States says Iran’s claims to control the strait are illegal, but Tehran has made escalating assertions of authority over the vital waterway.

IR.label: negative
